items.title: With 3 more blocks last night, Victor Wembanyama now holds the record for the most blocks (70) in a player's first NBA playoff run, surpassing Dikembe Mutombo's 69 (1993-94).
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
With 3 more blocks last night, Victor Wembanyama now holds the record for the most blocks (70) in a player's first NBA playoff run, surpassing Dikembe Mutombo's 69 (1993-94).

(via CrazyStats)
#NBA

items.title: Charles Barkley watching Cardi B’s halftime performance at Game 3 of the NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Charles Barkley watching Cardi B’s halftime performance at Game 3 of the NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden: 

“I don’t know if those B’s…. Maybe Cardi D’s. I’m pretty sure those are D’s! She got the wrong initials!” 

Chuck is hilarious! 😂🗣️

(via Courtside Buzz)
#NBA

items.title: Something had to change for the Spurs in Game 3, and it did. Maybe it was skybox karma. Maybe it was a head-clearing, statue-sketching trip to the park. Or maybe it was just getting to the rim, over and over again.
items.author: Mike Finger
items.body_excerpt:
Something had to change for the Spurs in Game 3, and it did. Maybe it was skybox karma. Maybe it was a head-clearing, statue-sketching trip to the park. Or maybe it was just getting to the rim, over and over again.

But this series ain’t over.

  www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: How Spurs embraced a distraction, possibly turned around NBA Finals vs. Knicks
media.description: By ruining what was left of the party with a ruthlessly methodical, stubbornly poised 115-111 victory, the Spurs made it clear this series is far from over.
